page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Second Impression Mini Bonus CD
text:
is a mini CD from the Sega Saturn Neon Genesis Evangelion: Second Impression video game soundtrack. It was released on 07 March 1997 enclosed with the game. The catalog number GS-9129P-01362. https://vgmdb.net/album/16707 It was performed by Yuko Miyamura and Kyoko Hikami.

Tracklist

Staff

Performer: Yuko Miyamura
Composer: Junko Shiratsu
Arranger: Junko Shiratsu, Akira Sasaki
Lyricist: Yoshika Shiokata

Performer: Kyoko Hikami
Composer: Junko Shiratsu
Arranger: Hirofumi Murasaki, Akira Sasaki
Lyricist: Yoshika Shiokata
